title: How Y Combinator's CEO ACTUALLY Uses Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Y Combinator CEO Garry Tan used Claude Code to produce 600,000 lines of code in 60 days, extracting four strategies including role assignment, parallel sessions, building custom tools, and planning before coding. The video references Tan's open-source gstack system and emphasizes agentic AI approaches to shipping code quickly.
